---
title: "Isaac Miller"
toc: TRUE
about: 
  template: jolla
  image: IMG_5761.jpeg
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 17em
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/isaac-miller-a687862b3/
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/isaacmiller1113
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: isaacmiller1113@gmail.com
      target: _blank
---

### ALOHA MAI KAKOU \~ Hello Everyone

My name is Isaac Miller, and I am an Environmental Studies student at the University of California, Santa Barbara with a strong interest in ocean and coastal systems. I grew up in Hawaiʻi, where spending time in the ocean and learning from my father, a biologist and environmental conservationist, shaped my passion for the natural world. My academic interests focus on marine ecosystems, environmental data analysis, and applied statistics, and I have experience working with tools such as R and GIS to analyze environmental data. Outside of the classroom, I am involved with the UCSB Surf Team and the Isla Vista Surfrider Foundation, where I help coordinate events that promote ocean stewardship and community engagement. Through my work and studies, I aim to combine scientific research, data analysis, and hands-on environmental work to better understand and protect coastal ecosystems.

### Education

**Environmental Studies B.S.** (2026) \| University of California, Santa Barbara

**High School** (2019) Punahou Schools - Honolulu, HI
